description: Sector overlay for accounting firms, audit practices, assurance providers, tax professionals, financial reporting professionals, and related professional-services documentation in the United States.

metadata.scope: United States-only sector overlay controls for Accounting. Intended to be used with core_control_library.
metadata.source_note: Source basis is mapped from official U.S. federal regulatory sources and widely used U.S. model/professional sources available at rule-pack publication time. This starter pack is not legal advice and requires expert validation before production reliance. State-specific requirements may apply.
metadata.external_knowledge_policy: No external knowledge is introduced during document evaluation. Regulatory source mappings live only in this versioned rule pack.

primary_sources.name: SEC financial reporting and disclosure framework
IRS Circular 230 / Office of Professional Responsibility

rules.title: PCAOB audit standard or registration evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for PCAOB registration, public-company audit, broker-dealer audit, or PCAOB-standard references.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified U.S. legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, jurisdictional scope, legal sufficiency, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.

rules.title: Audit documentation and sufficient evidence controls are present
rules.summary: Checks for audit workpaper, documentation, evidence, review, or engagement-quality language.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified U.S. legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, jurisdictional scope, legal sufficiency, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.

rules.title: SEC registrant financial-reporting evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for SEC reporting, Form 10-K/10-Q/8-K, internal control, or financial-statement disclosure language.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified U.S. legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, jurisdictional scope, legal sufficiency, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.

rules.title: Tax-practitioner Circular 230 conduct evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for Circular 230, competence, diligence, tax-practitioner, or IRS representation controls.

rules.title: Client information confidentiality or safeguards evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for client confidentiality, nonpublic information, secure records, or safeguards for client/customer information.
